markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on marketing initiatives and review a technical SEO audit.](https://fathom.video/share/EuPAEKEXunhzd-5gdv3Xaw-bj4Hc1yA3?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Blog CTA:** A new CTA component is ready for use in blog posts. GrowthX will explore adding a mid-page floating version and investigate creating daily short-form content from long-form articles to match competitor cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/EuPAEKEXunhzd-5gdv3Xaw-bj4Hc1yA3?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [**Benchmark Strategy:** Blaxel will create performance benchmarks (e.g., sandbox start times). GrowthX will explore using influencers for third-party validation and distribution, with Blaxel open to sponsorship.](https://fathom.video/share/EuPAEKEXunhzd-5gdv3Xaw-bj4Hc1yA3?tab=summary&timestamp=1404.0)
  - [**Technical SEO Audit:** A Screaming Frog audit found critical issues (JS blocking, orphaned URLs, 404s). Blaxel will fix these to improve search visibility and is considering renaming the `/vm` page to `/sandbox` for clarity.](https://fathom.video/share/EuPAEKEXunhzd-5gdv3Xaw-bj4Hc1yA3?tab=summary&timestamp=1742.0)

## Topics

### Technical SEO Audit

  - [A Screaming Frog crawl identified critical technical SEO issues impacting search visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/EuPAEKEXunhzd-5gdv3Xaw-bj4Hc1yA3?tab=summary&timestamp=1742.0)
  - [**Key Issues to Fix:**](https://fathom.video/share/EuPAEKEXunhzd-5gdv3Xaw-bj4Hc1yA3?tab=summary&timestamp=1804.0)
      - [JavaScript blocking resources on specific pages.](https://fathom.video/share/EuPAEKEXunhzd-5gdv3Xaw-bj4Hc1yA3?tab=summary&timestamp=1818.0)
      - [Orphaned URLs in the sitemap.](https://fathom.video/share/EuPAEKEXunhzd-5gdv3Xaw-bj4Hc1yA3?tab=summary&timestamp=1770.0)
      - [Non-indexable URLs in the sitemap.](https://fathom.video/share/EuPAEKEXunhzd-5gdv3Xaw-bj4Hc1yA3?tab=summary&timestamp=1770.0)
      - [Canonicalized pages.](https://fathom.video/share/EuPAEKEXunhzd-5gdv3Xaw-bj4Hc1yA3?tab=summary&timestamp=1818.0)
  - [**Specific Problem:** The old `/sandbox` URL is a 404 error, likely linked from the CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/EuPAEKEXunhzd-5gdv3Xaw-bj4Hc1yA3?tab=summary&timestamp=1864.0)
      - [**Action:** Implement a 301 redirect to the current `/vm` page to preserve link authority and user flow.](https://fathom.video/share/EuPAEKEXunhzd-5gdv3Xaw-bj4Hc1yA3?tab=summary&timestamp=1899.0)
  - [**Potential Page Rename:** Blaxel is considering renaming the `/vm` page to `/sandbox` for better industry alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/EuPAEKEXunhzd-5gdv3Xaw-bj4Hc1yA3?tab=summary&timestamp=1864.0)
      - [**Concern:** Risk of losing SEO authority from the existing `/vm` URL.](https://fathom.video/share/EuPAEKEXunhzd-5gdv3Xaw-bj4Hc1yA3?tab=summary&timestamp=1957.0)
      - [**GrowthX Advice:** A 301 redirect from `/vm` to `/sandbox` would preserve authority, making the rename safe.](https://fathom.video/share/EuPAEKEXunhzd-5gdv3Xaw-bj4Hc1yA3?tab=summary&timestamp=1957.0)

### Blog CTA Implementation

  - [A new CTA component is ready for use in blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/EuPAEKEXunhzd-5gdv3Xaw-bj4Hc1yA3?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [**Implementation:** Add a simple `[CTA variant_name]` shortcode directly in the CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/EuPAEKEXunhzd-5gdv3Xaw-bj4Hc1yA3?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [**Enhancements Requested:**](https://fathom.video/share/EuPAEKEXunhzd-5gdv3Xaw-bj4Hc1yA3?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)
      - [A mid-page floating CTA to capture attention in long-form articles.](https://fathom.video/share/EuPAEKEXunhzd-5gdv3Xaw-bj4Hc1yA3?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)
      - [A TLDR section that disappears on scroll to reduce visual clutter.](https://fathom.video/share/EuPAEKEXunhzd-5gdv3Xaw-bj4Hc1yA3?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)

### Short-Form Content Strategy

  - [Blaxel wants to create daily short-form content (e.g., tweets) from long-form articles to match competitor cadence (2–3 posts/day).](https://fathom.video/share/EuPAEKEXunhzd-5gdv3Xaw-bj4Hc1yA3?tab=summary&timestamp=1082.0)
  - [**Inspiration:** The Twitter profile of Ivan, founder of Daytona.](https://fathom.video/share/EuPAEKEXunhzd-5gdv3Xaw-bj4Hc1yA3?tab=summary&timestamp=1180.0)
  - [**Challenge:** GrowthX has a policy against posting as founders to avoid misrepresenting their personality.](https://fathom.video/share/EuPAEKEXunhzd-5gdv3Xaw-bj4Hc1yA3?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)
  - [**Path Forward:** GrowthX will investigate two options:](https://fathom.video/share/EuPAEKEXunhzd-5gdv3Xaw-bj4Hc1yA3?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)
    1.  [**Company Account Posts:** Create short-form content linking to Blaxel's blog from the company social media account.](https://fathom.video/share/EuPAEKEXunhzd-5gdv3Xaw-bj4Hc1yA3?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)
    2.  [**External Resource:** Refer a trusted social media expert for Blaxel to hire directly.](https://fathom.video/share/EuPAEKEXunhzd-5gdv3Xaw-bj4Hc1yA3?tab=summary&timestamp=1374.0)

### Benchmark Content Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Create and distribute performance benchmarks (e.g., sandbox start times) to showcase Blaxel's advantages.](https://fathom.video/share/EuPAEKEXunhzd-5gdv3Xaw-bj4Hc1yA3?tab=summary&timestamp=1404.0)
  - [**Distribution Channels:** Social media, dedicated landing pages, blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/EuPAEKEXunhzd-5gdv3Xaw-bj4Hc1yA3?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)
  - [**Challenge:** An existing open-source benchmark project is unmaintained (last updated \~1 year ago), making a contribution impractical.](https://fathom.video/share/EuPAEKEXunhzd-5gdv3Xaw-bj4Hc1yA3?tab=summary&timestamp=1503.0)
  - [**Proposed Solution:** Use social media influencers to create or validate benchmarks.](https://fathom.video/share/EuPAEKEXunhzd-5gdv3Xaw-bj4Hc1yA3?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)
      - [**Benefit:** Provides third-party validation and reaches a relevant audience.](https://fathom.video/share/EuPAEKEXunhzd-5gdv3Xaw-bj4Hc1yA3?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)
      - [**Blaxel:** Open to sponsorship, depending on cost.](https://fathom.video/share/EuPAEKEXunhzd-5gdv3Xaw-bj4Hc1yA3?tab=summary&timestamp=1675.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX (Carly):**](https://fathom.video/share/EuPAEKEXunhzd-5gdv3Xaw-bj4Hc1yA3?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
      - [Investigate creating daily short-form content from long-form articles.](https://fathom.video/share/EuPAEKEXunhzd-5gdv3Xaw-bj4Hc1yA3?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
      - [Research and provide a referral for a social media expert.](https://fathom.video/share/EuPAEKEXunhzd-5gdv3Xaw-bj4Hc1yA3?tab=summary&timestamp=1374.0)
  - [**GrowthX (Kathy):**](https://fathom.video/share/EuPAEKEXunhzd-5gdv3Xaw-bj4Hc1yA3?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)
      - [Contact influencers about creating or validating benchmarks; assess sponsorship costs.](https://fathom.video/share/EuPAEKEXunhzd-5gdv3Xaw-bj4Hc1yA3?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)
  - [**Blaxel (Nicolas):**](https://fathom.video/share/EuPAEKEXunhzd-5gdv3Xaw-bj4Hc1yA3?tab=summary&timestamp=1864.0)
      - [Implement the 301 redirect for the `/sandbox` 404 error.](https://fathom.video/share/EuPAEKEXunhzd-5gdv3Xaw-bj4Hc1yA3?tab=summary&timestamp=1864.0)
      - [Fix technical SEO issues from the Screaming Frog audit.](https://fathom.video/share/EuPAEKEXunhzd-5gdv3Xaw-bj4Hc1yA3?tab=summary&timestamp=1742.0)
      - [Decide on renaming the `/vm` page to `/sandbox`.](https://fathom.video/share/EuPAEKEXunhzd-5gdv3Xaw-bj4Hc1yA3?tab=summary&timestamp=1864.0)
      - [Implement the mid-page floating CTA and TLDR scroll-hide features.](https://fathom.video/share/EuPAEKEXunhzd-5gdv3Xaw-bj4Hc1yA3?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)
